events.label: reasoning
events.text:
>
{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 85, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.85, "event_time": 0, "rate": 0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Drain slope is less than the required 1/4 inch per foot, which will cause inadequate self-scouring velocity and solids deposition.", "Inadequate slope on a commercial drain line violates IPC 704 and creates a high risk of clogging, backups, and sewer gas/health hazards."], "actions": ["Re-support and re-grade the affected drain piping to achieve a minimum slope of 1/4 inch per foot.", "Re-inspect the corrected drain routing before closing or testing."], "rationale": "IPC 704 requires horizontal drainage piping to be installed with proper slope to maintain self-cleansing velocity. A slope under 1/4 in/ft in commercial drainage is below code minimum, is likely to strand solids, and is therefore non-compliant and defective at the rough-complete stage.", "references": ["IPC 704 - Slope of Horizontal Drainage Piping"]}
